common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.intro1: My name is Soledad. I'm a space created to support your emotional wellbeing.
welcome.intro2: Often the day-to-day doesn't leave us time to ask ourselves how we're really doing. Here there is time for that.
welcome.intro3: I won't evaluate you or give you diagnoses. I'll just listen, ask you some questions, and be present.
welcome.question: Whenever you're ready, tell me: what brought you here today?

landing.heroSub: Soledad accompanies you every day, detects how you're feeling, and alerts someone you trust when you need it.

free.title: Free Trial
free.note: After 15 days, automatically converts to Essential at $5/month.

essential.title: Essential
essential.note: Charged in USDT on Celo blockchain.
features: ✓ Soledad detects how you feel and adapts

premium.title: Premium
premium.note: Charged in USDT on Celo blockchain.

premiumModal.title: Activate Premium
premiumModal.message: To activate Premium, contact us at hello@breso.app. We'll activate it in less than 24 hours.

onboarding.step1Prompt: To start, I'd love to know your name.
onboarding.step2Prompt: Now I'd like to ask you something important.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: This is so Soledad can send you a message if she notices you're going through a difficult time. Only you will receive these messages.
onboarding.step3Prompt: There are moments when it's important for someone you trust to know how you're doing. Is there someone like that in your life?
onboarding.step3ContactNote: This is a person you want to know if you ever need support. It's not your number — it's theirs.
onboarding.step4Done: All set, {{name}}. Thank you for being here. Let's begin whenever you're ready.

chat.openingQuestion: To start, tell me: how was your day today?
chat.opening_morning: Good morning. To start, tell me: how was your day today?
chat.opening_afternoon: Good afternoon. To start, tell me: how was your day today?
chat.opening_evening: Good evening. To start, tell me: how was your day today?
chat.errorReply: Could not send. Please try again.

mockReplies.listening: I understand. It's not always easy to put feelings into words. Is there something specific that's been on your mind lately?
mockReplies.motivation: Choose one small step for today. What feels most within reach?
mockReplies.proposal: Perfect. Take a 15-minute walk today and note how you felt.
mockReplies.celebration: That's wonderful to hear. What was the best part of that moment?

dashboard.guide: Here you can see your progress
dashboard.checkin_pending: Today's check-in is waiting for you
dashboard.no_data: Complete your first check-in to see your progress
dashboard.error: Could not load the dashboard. Please try again.

checkin.title: Today's check-in
checkin.already_done: You already completed today's check-in. Come back tomorrow! 💙
checkin.privacy_note: Your response is analyzed and discarded. We never store message content.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: You don't have any notifications yet

contacts.title: Trusted Contacts
contacts.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this contact?

settings.title: Settings
settings.confirm_delete: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

help.title: Help & Support
help.faq1_a: Soledad is your wellness companion, here to listen and help you track your mental health.
help.faq2_a: Yes, we analyze conversations for patterns but never store original messages for your privacy.
help.faq3_q: How does the alert system work?
help.faq3_a: If Soledad detects crisis signals, an alert will be sent to your trusted contact.
help.faq4_a: Yes, you can cancel it at any time from your account settings.
help.faq5_q: What happens when my free trial ends?
help.faq5_a: You'll automatically be moved to the Essential plan unless you cancel beforehand.
help.faq6_q: How do I add a trusted contact?
help.faq6_a: You can add one from the 'Contacts' tab, registering their name, phone, and relationship.
help.crisis_subtitle: If you are going through a very difficult time, these lines are available 24/7, are free, and completely confidential.
help.emergency_disclaimer: BRESO is not an emergency service. If you are in immediate danger, please call your local emergency number.

family_dashboard.title: Family Dashboard
family_dashboard.tip1: Listen without judgment and offer unconditional support.
family_dashboard.tip2: Ask directly how you can be helpful right now.
